title: OverlayProgress Class
description: Represents an overlay progress box that displays ongoing tasks.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: fadeOutTime: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the fade‑out duration of the animation.

methods.name: add(name: string): OverlayProgressItem
methods.description: Creates and adds a newly created overlay progress UI to the list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The display name of the overlay progress UI.

returns.description: Returns the newly created overlay progress item.

methods.name: displayProgress<T>(name: string, task: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T>
methods.description: Creates an overlay progress UI and attaches a promise to it.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The display name of the overlay progress UI.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: The promise task attach to it.
